prerequisites: An Opinion Stage account (the API is open on all plans).
At least one Opinion Stage item (such as a quiz, survey, or form) that collects responses, since the Public Result API returns the data your items collect.
Your personal API key, retrieved from your account page at https://app.opinionstage.com/dashboard/settings/account/edit.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Opinion Stage authenticates the Public Result API with HTTP Basic authentication using your personal API key. Set the api_key value as the Basic auth username and leave the password blank. This maps to the connector's single api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Opinion Stage and open your account page at https://app.opinionstage.com/dashboard/settings/account/edit. Copy your personal API key from there.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter your personal API key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it to the Public Result API at https://api.opinionstage.com using HTTP Basic auth, with the key as the username and an empty password.

setupSteps.title: Confirm access to your items
setupSteps.body: The Public Result API returns data your items collect (lists of items, item details, and individual responses) in JSONAPI format. Verify your account has at least one item collecting responses. Note: the API is in beta, does not support the poll format, and Opinion Stage recommends consulting them before production use.

sources.title: Opinion Stage Public Result API - OpenAPI spec (securitySchemes: API key as Basic auth username, blank password; base URL https://api.opinionstage.com)
Does Opinion Stage offer an API? (Help Center - API open for all plans)
